zh.Faslane Castle, Dunbartonshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾
zh.Gargunnock, Central Scotland, Scotland,: 英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾加根諾可
zh.lifeSummary: Eva de Menteith於1135年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾。她和Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer至少有8個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1171年之後在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾，埋葬在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾。

zh-hans.Gargunnock, Central Scotland, Scotland,: 英国苏格兰斯林史爾加根諾可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eva de Menteith于1135年出生在英国苏格兰培爾。她和Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer至少有8个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1171年之后在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾，埋葬在苏格兰登巴頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: Eva de Menteith was born in 1135, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. She had at least 8 sons and 1 daughter with Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer. She died after 1171, in Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, and was buried in Dunbartonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Eva de Menteith est née en 1135, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille avec Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer. Elle est décédée après 1171, à Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Dunbartonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Eva de Menteith wurde 1135 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1171 in Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunbartonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Eva de Menteith è nata il nel 1135 nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia con Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer. Morì dopo il 1171, nel Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Dunbartonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva de Menteithは1135年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた。彼女はAilin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaerとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1171年以後にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアで死去し，スコットランドダンバートンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva de Menteith(은)는 1135년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1171년 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 던바토실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Eva de Menteith nasceu em 1135, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha com Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer. Ela faleceu após 1171, em Dunbartonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Dunbartonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Eva de Menteith родилась в 1135 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь от Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer. Она умерла после 1171 г. в местности дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности дунбартоншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Eva de Menteith nació en 1135, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija con Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer. Murió después de 1171, en Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Dunbartonshire, Scotland.
